display_name: 米奇喵 1.21 基础测试整合包
summary: MMCL Phase 1 fixture: Sodium + Fabric API + REI + Indium (Pending fixture)
description: This is a minimal modpack used as a fixture during MMCL Phase 1 implementation of the modpack source ecosystem. It is NOT the final '米奇喵 基础美化包'. See https://github.com/WangSimiao2000/MiaoMinecraftLauncher/blob/main/docs/modpack-source-phase1-spec.md for the design spec. Indium is included as a real-world Pending fixture: its author stopped updating after Sodium 1.21.2 made it redundant, so on 1.21.4/1.21.5/1.21.7 the resolver will mark it Pending while the other 3 mods install normally.
